header.title: Wishlist Builder
header.existingTotalsTooltip: Total weight and cost of all existing wishlists (sum of saved amounts on the game).

manage.confirmDelete_one: Delete {{count}} wishlist? This can't be undone.
manage.confirmDelete_other: Delete {{count}} wishlists? This can't be undone.

table.includeAllAria: Include all materials in this table
table.includeAllTitle: Include/exclude all materials in this table

material.label: Material
material.tooltip: Material required for this step. Stars are shown in brackets and are not exported.

required.label: Required
required.tooltip: Total materials required for this step.

repair.label: Repair
repair.tooltip: Amount of this material needed for repairs, included in the total above.

exchangeStock.tooltip: Available stock in the exchange warehouse.

scrapBuffer.label: Scrap (Buffer)
scrapBuffer.tooltip: Scrap refunds and optional 0.5 day buffer.

current.label: Current
current.tooltip: Current amount in the selected wishlist.

weight.label: Weight
weight.tooltip: Total weight of the Add column.

cost.label: Cost
cost.tooltip: Total cost of the Add column.

add.label: Add
add.tooltip: Amount that will be exported to the wishlist.

milestones.description: Submitting will create one wishlist per milestone (and one for any remaining goals after the last milestone). Empty groups are skipped.
milestones.emptyGroup: No materials needed, wishlist will be skipped.

settings.title: Settings
settings.scrapTimeTooltip: Estimated time until buildings are scrapped
settings.cargoOverweight: Construction materials alone exceed cargo capacity
settings.cargoScaled: Consumables/inputs scaled to {{percent}}% to match cargo capacity
settings.cargoOverweightCombined: Construction materials alone exceed the combined cargo capacity
settings.cargoScaledCombined: Consumables/inputs scaled to {{percent}}% to match the combined cargo capacity across all bases
settings.cargoScaledPerBaseNote: Each base scaled to fit its own cargo capacity. See per-base sections below.

advanced.intermediatesTooltip: Buffer of materials the base both produces and consumes. Gives secondary factories starting stock while primary factories ramp up
advanced.repairBufferTooltip: Hours of additional building damage to also cover

preview.title: Preview
preview.noBaseIssueData: No base issue data available for grouped preview.
preview.cargoOverweightPerBase: Construction materials alone exceed this base's cargo budget
preview.cargoScaledPerBase: Consumables/inputs scaled to {{percent}}% to match this base's cargo budget
preview.enableSupplemental: Enable consumables, inputs or intermediates to see a preview.
preview.noSupplementalData: No consumables, inputs or intermediates data available for this base.
preview.noSupplementalSelected: No consumables, inputs or intermediates selected.

footer.rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait before trying again.

submit.rateLimited: Rate limited while updating base wishlists.
submit.baseWishlistsAlreadyMatch: Base wishlists already match the preview.

roo.story: Roo wrote one of the first community tools for the game: base summaries, a build planner and wishlists, back when the game had no wishlists of its own. A fair bit of what you are using here was influenced by his work.
